intro: Creatio launched a conversational development tool and AI studio to extend its no-code platform beyond traditional workflows, enabling both business users and IT teams to build applications more flexibly. ASML raised its sales forecast for the second time this year, citing sustained strong demand from customers ramping up AI chip production capacity. OpenAI is developing a screenless speaker device designed to feel like a physical companion, reportedly featuring moving mechanical elements and built in collaboration with designer Jony Ive.

whitelist.title: ChatGPT is down.
